user.title: Connect to iAqualink
user.description: Enter your Jandy iAqualink account credentials.

pick_device.title: Select pump
pick_device.description: Multiple iQPUMP01 devices were found. Choose which one to add.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your iAqualink credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the iAqualink cloud. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_device: No iQPUMP01 (i2d) device was found on this account. Make sure the device is registered in the iAqualink app.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This pump is already configured in Home Assistant.
